# Judith Oluchi Ekeleme — Portfolio

## Who I am

Judith Oluchi Ekeleme is a Zero-to-One Product Lead and Technical AI PM based in Nigeria. She has taken three products from zero to live, owning the full product surface each time: consumer app, admin dashboard, backend architecture, and go-to-market strategy.

Her technical depth spans MLOps pipelines, LLMOps orchestration, multi-agent RAG systems, and agentic system design. She builds high-fidelity Figma prototypes herself using Claude MCP integration, eliminating traditional design handoff cycles.

## Current role

Lead Product Manager (Contract): building a three-platform Nigerian loan management system from zero: borrower mobile app, collector mobile and web app, and admin dashboard. Full PRD suite across all three platforms covering CBN/FCCPC compliance, NIBSS payment rails, and multi-lender portfolio management.

Previously Lead PM at Powerhouse9ja, a prize-draw platform enabling Nigerians to win high-value homes as an alternative to mortgage debt.

## Projects

**P90** — Full-stack agentic platform for AI product unit economics. A four-node LangGraph agent that monitors cost variance across seven infrastructure layers, detects anomalies, simulates worst-case margin trajectories, and generates ranked pricing recommendations for human approval. Built on LangGraph, FastAPI, Groq, Langfuse, Vercel, Supabase. Live at p90app.vercel.app. Full case study at /case-studies/p90.html.

**Truvyx** — Evaluation and diagnostic intelligence platform for multi-agent AI systems. Six modules: Scenario Studio, Constraint Engine, Verifier Factory, Decomposition Designer, Benchmark Registry, and Agentic RCA Engine. Covers seven industries. Live at truvyx.vercel.app. Full case study at /case-studies/truvyx.html.

**CognArc** — Agentic AI platform for continuous cognitive evaluation of AI outputs. Scores AI systems for cognitive load, trust coherence, manipulation risk, and comprehension using TRIBE v2 fMRI research. Built on React 18, TypeScript, FastAPI, Docker, GCP Cloud Run. Live at cognarc-landing.vercel.app. Full case study at /case-studies/cognarc.html.

**CPNA** — Multi-agent RAG clinical pediatric nutrition assistant. Provides evidence-based nutrition therapy for children with chronic conditions (cystic fibrosis, PKU, CKD, epilepsy) using deterministic safety guardrails. Zero LLM nutrient computations: all clinical outputs trace to the deterministic nutrient engine or DRI tables. Nigeria-specific food mapping included. Built on Python, LangChain, FAISS, DistilBERT, Groq API, LLaMA, Qdrant. Full case study at /case-studies/cpna.html.

**CPNA Evaluation Suite** — Standalone precision instrument for testing and scoring every layer of the CPNA system. Five evaluator modules, 10 canonical E2E scenarios, 12 dashboard surfaces. Built on Next.js and FastAPI. Live at cpna-eval-one.vercel.app. Blog post at /blog/cpna-eval.html.

**Fashville** — AI-powered two-sided social commerce platform for African fashion creators entering global markets. Full AI architecture including a proprietary African fashion ontology and multimodal feature pipeline. Full case study at /case-studies/fashville.html.

**Powerhouse9ja** — Consumer fintech prize-draw platform. iOS, Android, and admin dashboard. Live at powerhouse9ja.com.

## Prototypes

**Kyvo Loan Admin Dashboard** — Admin and analytics dashboard serving as single source of truth for a three-platform Nigerian loan management system. Live at kyvoloan.netlify.app.

**TrisoNet Trading Zone** — African marketplace connecting buyers, citizen sellers, and verified business partners. Features real-time price negotiation and GKWTH cryptocurrency exchange. Live at trisonet-prototype.netlify.app.

**User Loan App** — High-fidelity Figma prototype for the borrower-facing mobile app. Figma: figma.com/design/oJ4jfjZ6Fxmuzmmk76mM1b/User-Loan-App

**Loan Collector App** — High-fidelity Figma prototype for the field collector mobile app. Figma: figma.com/design/v2dkCDVjpqvn8SKJiLw0N0/Loan-Collector-App

## Credentials

Oracle Cloud Infrastructure Generative AI Professional · Duke LLMOps · Duke MLOps · Stanford Machine Learning Specialization · IBM AI Product Manager Professional · McKinsey Digital Transformation Leadership · Coursera LLM Benchmarking and Evaluation

MBA, Marketing: NEXT MBA, Next University Valencia (2025)
BSc Nutrition and Dietetics: University of Nigeria, Nsukka (2013)
